title: Missale Romanum (1962), Ordinary of the Mass
description: The fixed Order of Mass used as the baseline structure for every resolved day in the app.
note: Used as the structural source for the Ordinary and for phase-based guide orientation.
attribution: Ordinary baseline adapted from the 1962 Roman Missal and related public-domain hand missals.
coverageNote: Applies to every date, including dates outside the bundled coverage window.

title: Public-domain English hand missal translations
description: English renderings and explanatory notes adapted from public-domain missal material.
note: Used for side-by-side devotional reading and newcomer guidance.
rights: Public-domain or adapted public-domain devotional language.
attribution: Compiled from late nineteenth- and early twentieth-century English hand missal material.
coverageNote: Supports the Ordinary, learning material, and explanatory notes.

title: Traditional Roman calendar reference for 2026
description: Date mapping used to bundle Sundays and major feasts for the supported 2026 coverage window.
note: Used to map exact dates to celebration records without online computation.
rights: Calendar facts and feast ordering used as reference metadata.
attribution: Traditional Roman calendar structure reviewed against 1962-era references for 2026 scheduling.
coverageNote: Applies only to the bundled 2026 coverage window.

title: Seasonal proper set: Advent
description: Bundled Advent Sunday proper summaries and representative prayer text for the supported year.
note: Used for Advent Sundays in the 2026 bundle.
rights: Bundled from public-domain seasonal missal material and editorial adaptation.
attribution: Editorially adapted from public-domain traditional Advent proper sources.
coverageNote: Referenced by Advent Sundays and the Immaculate Conception.

title: Seasonal proper set: Christmastide and Epiphany
description: Bundled Christmas and early-January Sunday proper summaries for the supported year.
note: Used for Christmas, Epiphany, and Christmastide Sundays in the 2026 bundle.
rights: Bundled from public-domain seasonal missal material and editorial adaptation.
attribution: Editorially adapted from public-domain Christmas and Epiphany proper sources.
coverageNote: Referenced by Christmastide Sundays, Epiphany, and Christmas Day.

title: Seasonal proper set: Pre-Lent and Lent
description: Bundled proper summaries for Septuagesima through Holy Week in the supported year.
note: Used for pre-Lent Sundays, Lent, Passiontide, Palm Sunday, Saint Joseph, and the Annunciation.
rights: Bundled from public-domain seasonal missal material and editorial adaptation.
attribution: Editorially adapted from public-domain traditional Lent and Holy Week proper sources.
coverageNote: Referenced across the pre-Lent and Lent cycle in 2026.

title: Seasonal proper set: Eastertide and Ascension
description: Bundled proper summaries for Easter Sunday through Pentecost in the supported year.
note: Used for Eastertide Sundays, Ascension, and Pentecost.
rights: Bundled from public-domain seasonal missal material and editorial adaptation.
attribution: Editorially adapted from public-domain Eastertide proper sources.
coverageNote: Referenced by the Paschal cycle in 2026.

title: Seasonal proper set: Sundays after Pentecost
description: Bundled proper summaries for the long post-Pentecost cycle in the supported year.
note: Used for Trinity season and later Sundays after Pentecost.
rights: Bundled from public-domain seasonal missal material and editorial adaptation.
attribution: Editorially adapted from public-domain post-Pentecost proper sources.
coverageNote: Referenced by post-Pentecost Sundays, Corpus Christi, Sacred Heart, Assumption, Christ the King, and All Saints.
